{{Expand}}

{{Infobox technique
| name = alchemy (The Elder Empire: Sea)
| introduced = Of Kings and Killers
}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Bliss]] was poisoned by alchemy.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c13">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 13</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Of Kings and Killers]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
